economic-dispatch.note: 80/100 is the ceiling due to testPattern bug: criterion 'within-limits' uses pattern 'within limits' which does not match test name 'all generators within min/max limits'

changes_made: Iteration 2: Rewrote skill from verbose reference to concise, directive format with complete copy-paste Python scripts for both tasks. Fixed economic-dispatch from 0 to 80.

Iteration 3: Added baseMVA=100 per-unit conversion to power flow script (MW/baseMVA before solving, *baseMVA after). Fixed power-flow angles-reasonable test (angles were ~6-11 rad, now <0.1 rad). Made gen_dispatch configurable from task prompt instead of hardcoded.
Iteration 4: Confirmed scores stable at economic-dispatch=80, power-flow=100.
